EmailTemplate.name: EmailTemplate_NBCU_Completion_Migration
EmailTemplate.Body:
$Header

Notification

$Notification


Action Required

#if($affiliateAccountCreationMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap) #foreach( $data in $affiliateAccountCreationMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap.entrySet()) #set($key = $data.key) #set($value = $data.value) #if($key.equals("statuscheck")) #set($statuscheck = $value) #end #end #if($statuscheck)

Please ensure that this email or information is provided to the Requestee.




Please allow 3-4 hours for Affiliate Account to replicate in all systems.


#end #end #if($adminAccountCreationMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap) #foreach( $data in $adminAccountCreationMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap.entrySet()) #set($key = $data.key) #set($value = $data.value) #if($key.equals("statuscheck")) #set($statuscheck = $value) #elseif($key.equals("formattedDate")) #set($formattedDate = $value) #end #end #if($statuscheck) Please submit a Service Now ticket with the domain services team for the following:

1.Provide groups detail for your admin access
2. If you need admin access to other domains and DMZs.

Please use below link to register your Admin Account SSO ID Register


Account was created on $formattedDate #end #end #if($botAccountMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap) #foreach( $data in $botAccountMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap.entrySet()) #set($key = $data.key) #set($value = $data.value) #if($key.equals("statuscheck")) #set($statuscheck = $value) #elseif($key.equals("formattedDate")) #set($formattedDate = $value) #end #end #if($statuscheck) Please ensure that this email or information is provided to the Requestor.


Please use below link to register your Application BOT Account SSO ID
Register


Please allow 3-4 hours for BOT Account to replicate in all systems.

Note: Effective Jan 1, 2020 all New Bot Accounts passwords are required to change annually per Identification and Authentication Standard. #end #end #if($createGenericMailboxMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap) #foreach( $data in $createGenericMailboxMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap.entrySet()) #set($key = $data.key) #set($value = $data.value) #if($key.equals("statuscheck")) #set($statuscheck = $value) #elseif($key.equals("formattedDate")) #set($formattedDate = $value) #elseif($key.equals("isMailTypeMailbox")) #set($isMailTypeMailbox = $value) #elseif($key.equals("mailType")) #set($mailType = $value) #end #end #if($statuscheck) #if($isMailTypeMailbox) Please ensure that this email or information is provided to the new user.


The user can register their generic $mailType by using the link
http://registermysso.inbcu.com


Generic $mailType was created on $formattedDate. Login credentials will be shared in a separate email.


Once user has registered please take sometime to update user's telephone number/s and internal location details here:
http://iam.inbcu.com/idm/user


Please allow around 6 hours for Mail Box replication before you register the new SSO ID and 24 hours for GAL auto sync. #else Please ensure that this email or information is provided to the new user.


Generic $mailType was created on $formattedDate.


#end #end #end #if($functionalTestAccountDrupalMailboxMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap) #foreach( $data in $functionalTestAccountDrupalMailboxMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap.entrySet()) #set($key = $data.key) #set($value = $data.value) #if($key.equals("statuscheck")) #set($statuscheck = $value) #elseif($key.equals("formattedDate")) #set($formattedDate = $value) #end #end #if($statuscheck) If the Test Account needs to be registered then raise Service Now request with the messaging team to create a mailbox for the account.

The Test Account can be registered by using the link http://registermysso.inbcu.com

Account was created on $formattedDate. #end #end #if($serviceAccountCreationMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap) #foreach( $data in $serviceAccountCreationMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap.entrySet()) #set($key = $data.key) #set($value = $data.value) #if($key.equals("statuscheck")) #set($statuscheck = $value) #elseif($key.equals("formattedDate")) #set($formattedDate = $value) #elseif($key.equals("newlyCreatedSafeName")) #set($newlyCreatedSafeName = $value) #elseif($key.equals("svcName")) #set($svcName = $value) #elseif($key.equals("containerName")) #set($containerName = $value) #end #end #if($statuscheck) The Service Account has been onboarded to CyberArk successfully. This group has been created: $newlyCreatedSafeName. The group will grant you access to $containerName Safe and the service account password. Kindly login and retrieve the password using the Cyberark. Please ensure that this email or information is provided to the Requestor.

Please use below link to register your Application Service Account SSO ID
Register



Please allow 3-4 hours for Service Account to replicate in all systems.

Note: Effective Jan 1, 2020 all New Application Service Accounts passwords are required to change annually per Identification and Authentication Standard . #end #end

For any technical issue, please raise a service now request ticket ServiceNow

Identity & Access Management Portal

Argument.name: affiliateAccountCreationMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap
Argument.Description: Email Template Table Value for Notify Completion Step in Workflow_NBCU_AffiliateAccount_Creation_Migration

Argument.name: adminAccountCreationMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap
Argument.Description: Email Template Table Value for Notify Completion Step in Workflow_NBCU_AdminAccount_Creation_Migration

Argument.name: botAccountMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap
Argument.Description: Email Template Table Value for Notify Completion Step in Workflow_NBCU_Application_BOT_Account_Migration

Argument.name: createGenericMailboxMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap
Argument.Description: Email Template Table Value for Notify Completion Step in Workflow_NBCU_Create_Generic_Mailbox_Migration

Argument.name: functionalTestAccountDrupalMailboxMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap
Argument.Description: Email Template Table Value for Notify Completion Step in Workflow_NBCU_FunctionalTestAccount_Drupal_Migration

Argument.name: serviceAccountCreationMigrationNotifyCompletionDataMap
Argument.Description: Email Template Table Value for Notify Completion Step in Workflow_NBCU_ServiceAccount_Creation_Migration

Argument.name: identityName
Argument.Description: The name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: requesterName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: workItem
Argument.Description: The WorkItem object for the certification.

Argument.name: identityDisplayName
Argument.Description: The name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: CCAddress
Argument.Description: The name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: managerEmail
Argument.Description: The name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: requesteeFullName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: requesterFullName
Argument.Description: The name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: identityRequestId
Argument.Description: The name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: requesteeEmail
Argument.Description: The name of the Identity that is being changed.

EmailTemplate.Subject: $Subject
